description_long: This is a ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head with two distinct ends: a flat striking face and a rounded peen. The head is securely mounted on a smoothly contoured, dark brown wooden handle that appears slightly curved for ergonomic grip. The handle tapers gently towards the base, providing a comfortable hold and better control during use. The metallic head has a matte finish, with no visible markings or logos, and both the flat and rounded ends are clean and undamaged. The wood grain of the handle is visible, adding a natural texture and aesthetic contrast to the dark metal. The hammer appears well-crafted and pristine, with no signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a smooth, curved wooden handle, both in pristine condition.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the narrow edge, showing the slim profile of the head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the side, clearly displaying the flat striking face and rounded peen of the head, as well as the curved wooden handle.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow edge is visible, highlighting the rounded peen end and the handle's length.
description_view_3: The hammer is shown from the other side, again revealing both the flat and rounded ends of the head and the handle's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and visible wood grain, designed for ergonomic grip.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, both made of dark steel.
